overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a waterfront amusement park pier in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning along a covered walkway with canvas roofing, passing a stationary roller coaster car, and ending in an open plaza with palm trees overlooking a futuristic city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront promenade with canvas canopy

events.description: NPC character runs past the camera from left to right heading in the opposite direction
entering the darker interior section of the covered walkway with the canvas canopy overhead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade under the covered walkway, approaching the amusement park structure

notable_agents.action: NPC in tank top and gloves runs past the camera heading toward the background

entered.detail: Striped canvas roofing supported by red metal trusses covering the walkway
Red metal roller coaster support structure running parallel to the waterfront
Metal safety railing along the edge of the water
Futuristic city buildings and skyscrapers visible across the water
Red and yellow patterned concrete paving tiles on the walkway surface

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with an NPC running past the camera on a covered waterfront promenade. The camera moves forward under a canvas canopy structure with red metal trusses, approaching a staff shipping container. The roller coaster track runs parallel on the left side with the city skyline visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: roller coaster boarding platform with stationary ride vehicle

events.description: approaching the stationary roller coaster car positioned on the track ahead
camera turns right to circle around and examine the stationary roller coaster car

agents.ego_description: approaching and circling the stationary roller coaster car to examine the ride vehicle up close

entered.detail: Empty roller coaster ride vehicle with red padded seats and yellow safety restraint bars
Dark green shipping container with 'STAFF' painted in white letters on the side
Vertical illuminated poster with 'REAL FRESH' text and character portrait
Yellow metal pipe safety barriers blocking off restricted areas

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the covered walkway and approaches a stationary roller coaster car on the platform. The scene features a staff shipping container and advertising posters. The camera circles around the empty ride vehicle with red seats, examining it from different angles while the waterfront and city remain visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: amusement park exit corridor with turnstiles and safety barriers

events.description: turning away from the roller coaster car to head back through the covered structure
approaching the metal turnstile gates marking the exit area

agents.ego_description: walking back through the covered walkway toward the exit turnstiles, passing safety barriers

entered.detail: Metal turnstile barriers for crowd control at the exit
White 'EXIT' text painted on the red walkway surface

segments.scene_description: The camera moves away from the roller coaster car and proceeds back through the covered walkway toward the exit. The path is lined with yellow pipe barriers and turnstile gates. The staff shipping container is now visible on the left side as the camera approaches the exit signage painted on the floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront plaza with seating and palm trees

events.description: exiting the covered structure into the bright open plaza with palm trees
moving from shadow into bright direct sunlight as the camera enters the open area

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward the waterfront railing, observing the city view and palm tree planters

entered.detail: Open concrete plaza area with no roof covering and clear sky above
Tall palm trees planted in square concrete planters
Modern concrete seating benches along the walkway
Raised concrete planter boxes with vegetation

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered structure into a bright open plaza with palm trees and concrete benches. The canvas canopy and turnstiles are left behind as the scene opens up to full sky visibility. The city skyline appears closer and more prominent across the water, with the waterfront railing visible on the left side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sheltered waterfront promenade that gradually opens into a bright, expansive plaza overlooking a futuristic skyline. It begins under a red metal canvas canopy as an NPC runs past, moving forward alongside a parallel roller coaster track with the city visible across the water. As the camera approaches a stationary roller coaster car, it circles the red seats and nearby staff shipping container before turning back toward the walkway's exit. The scene then shifts past yellow pipe barriers and turnstile gates, following floor signage that leads out of the covered structure. Finally, the camera emerges into an open plaza filled with palm trees and concrete benches, where the skyline becomes more prominent against a clear sky.
